name: heading
label: Heading
default: Stay SOC2 compliant through and after your migration

name: body_content
label: Body Text
default: Migrating to Partner Center 3.0 is an opportunity to close a frequently overlooked SOC2 control gap. g/d/n/a offers automated workflows for employee onboarding and offboarding — ensuring every resource change in Partner Center 3.0 is tracked, documented, and audit-ready. If you have an active SOC2 program or an upcoming audit, this add-on gives you the paper trail you need at no additional cost.
